title: Price / Benchmark Performance
research_question: How did the stock's price path behave over the available period?
why_selected: Price path is the starting evidence for opportunity cost and volatility context.

title: Drawdown / Risk Path
research_question: How large were the peak-to-trough losses?
why_selected: Drawdown makes the risk path visible instead of hiding it behind return numbers.

title: Financial Trend
research_question: Is the company showing financial progression?
why_selected: Revenue trend is a first-pass anchor before interpreting margins and cash flow.

title: Money Flow / Cash Flow Bridge
research_question: Where does cash come from and where is it consumed?
why_selected: Money flow is central to judging whether the business funds itself or consumes external capital.

title: Valuation Frame
research_question: Which valuation lens is available and meaningful?
why_selected: Valuation charts should frame expectations, not imply a target price.
